name: Greek Stuffed Peppers

ingredients.item: One pound of green bell peppers
One cup of chopped red onions

method: Add the butter and chopped onions into the pan.
Cook the onion until it turns soft.
Add the garlic and ginger as well as the chopped zucchini, chopped
potatoes, tomatoes, tomato paste, and chopped carrots.
Cook the vegetables well for about ten minutes.
Add the granulated sugar, cooked rice, salt, and pepper.
Mix everything well and dish out.
Clean the bell peppers from inside and add the cooked mixture into it.
Add the mixed cheese on top and place the bell peppers on a greased
Bake the bell peppers until the cheese turns light golden brown.
Garnish the bell peppers with freshly chopped parsley leaves.
Your dish is ready to be served.
